title: Backrooms: Noclipped
description: Backrooms: Noclipped is a mod that adds Backrooms to Minecraft
body:
# Do you know what Backrooms are?
Backrooms is an endless space of yellow wallpaper and wet carpets with thousands of levels.
Will you be able to reach the end? Do you want Backrooms in Minecraft? Then download this mod
# Сreatures?
Are there creatures in the Backrooms levels? Unfortunately there are, you can see their list below

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  Bacteria(Level 0)
</details>

# Random generation?
That's right! Each time the level changes and this adds features to this mod
# What are the levels?
Attention, levels can only be reached with the command **_/noclip [level number]_**

### Level 0:"The Lobby"
### Level 1:"Habitable Zone"
